notes: Plays perfectly out of the box, with no issues whatsoever. No glitches, shading issues, or lag, and gamepad works perfectly, as if it was natively supported. One issue I did have which I assume to be me using too much RAM was the game would close automatically after 45-50 minutes, but once I closed my programs it ran longer and didn't close again
title: Shining Resonance Refrain

notes: The game runs really well performance wise and without any issues.
title: Shining Resonance Refrain

notes: Perfect gameplay out of the box, no need for any kind of tweaks.
